choices.text: ROS 2 uses DDS (decentralized, real-time, multi-robot), supports embedded, has built-in security (SROS2). ROS 1 EOL May 2025; new projects → ROS 2. Use Jazzy (2024 LTS) or Humble (2022 LTS) for production.
LTS (Long-Term Support): Humble (2022-2027) or Jazzy (2024-2029). LTS gets 5 years support; non-LTS only ~1-2 years. Production stability requires LTS.
